title: Emerald Law Offices announces promotions: Khizer A Qureshi and Abhishek Sharma made Partner
description: Emerald Law Offices has announced promotions, elevating Khizer A Qureshi and Abhishek Sharma to partnership.Qureshi has nearly a decade of experience in advising domestic and international clients on M&A, private equity and venture capital transactions, commercial contracts, renewable energy and other infrastructure projects, and corporate advisory.He also advises institutions, businesses and emerging enterprises, organisations on data protection laws and the evolving regulatory frameworks.
